summary: Iteration 38: Frontend testing of Mes Réservations vignette grid layout and simplified reservation creation form. All 12 test scenarios passed. Tested: login, navigation to Mes Réservations, grid layout verification (CSS grid with 5 columns), vignette card structure (icon, badges, asset name, site/dates, action buttons), overdue cards with red border and 'Retard' badge, tab switching (Actives/Historique), search input filtering, detail drawer opening, checkout modal on Confirmé cards, checkin modal on En cours cards, cancel button styling, and simplified create form (only Asset, Site, Adresse, Date début, Date fin, Priorité, Note - NO Utilisateur/Équipe/Projet fields).
passed_tests: TEST 1: Login with admin/user@1234 - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
TEST 2: Navigate to /reservation/myreservations - Mes Réservations page loads
TEST 3: Page structure - my-reservations container, title 'Mes Réservations', toolbar found
TEST 4: Grid layout - mr-grid class applied, display:grid with 5 columns (308px each)
TEST 5: Vignette cards - 19 cards with mr-vignette class, icon, 2 badges, asset name, 3 info rows, action buttons
TEST 6: Tab switching - Actives/Historique tabs work correctly
TEST 7: Search input - filters reservation cards
TEST 8: Detail drawer - opens on eye icon click, closes correctly
TEST 9: Checkout modal - opens on 'Sortie' button click for Confirmé cards
TEST 10: Checkin modal - 'Retour' button found on En cours cards
TEST 11: Overdue cards - 3 cards with red border (mr-vignette--overdue) and 'Retard' badge
TEST 12: Create form simplified - only 7 fields (Asset, Site, Adresse, Date début, Date fin, Priorité, Note) - NO Utilisateur/Équipe/Projet
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumMyReservations.jsx: Grid layout correctly implemented with CSS grid (line 298: grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)))
PremiumMyReservations.jsx: Vignette cards have proper structure with mr-vignette class, icon, badges, info rows, action buttons
PremiumMyReservations.jsx: Overdue detection works (line 170: isOverdue = r.status === 'in_progress' && new Date(r.end_date) < new Date())
PremiumMyReservations.jsx: Overdue styling applied with mr-vignette--overdue class and red border (line 305)
PremiumReservationPlanning.jsx: Create form simplified - lines 434-505 show only Asset, Site, Adresse, Date début, Date fin, Priorité, Note fields
PremiumReservationPlanning.jsx: No Utilisateur/Équipe/Projet fields in createForm state (line 51-55) or form UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested Mes Réservations vignette grid layout and simplified create form. Key data-testids verified: my-reservations, myres-title, myres-list (mr-grid), myres-toolbar, myres-search, tab-active, tab-past, res-card-{i}, checkout-btn-{i}, checkin-btn-{i}, cancel-btn-{i}, detail-btn-{i}, detail-drawer, co-modal, ci-modal, export-csv-btn, ws-indicator, create-modal, create-asset, create-start, create-end, create-address, create-submit. Grid shows 5 columns on desktop (308px each). Overdue cards have mr-vignette--overdue class with red border. Create form has 7 fields only (no Utilisateur/Équipe/Projet). External API is slow (6+ seconds) - wait accordingly.
